category: 商业生产级信息图-行业垂直-医疗
source: G7 Track G 演化结晶 - 医疗健康行业垂直融合

color_palette.description: 医疗冷静蓝绿体系: 主蓝绿#00897B(诊断) + 蓝#1976D2(治疗) + 绿#2EA86B(康复) + 琥珀#F57C00(警示) + 红#D32F2F(危急)

typography.description: HarmonyOS Sans(主) + Microsoft YaHei(辅), 医疗术语清晰可读, 6级字号层次

layout.card_style: rounded rectangle, border-radius 8px, 医疗标准卡片
layout.card_background: clinical white #FAFCFE with medical tint accents
layout.badges: medical cross icons, clinical pathway markers
layout.description: 医疗融合布局: 放射(疾病分类)+树状(治疗层级)+矩阵(症状严重度), 医疗十字图标, 临床洁净美学

visual_frequency.HF: 医疗核心概念 + 诊断图标 + 主色强调 (前1/3画面)
visual_frequency.MF: 治疗方案 + 用药信息 + 中性色支撑 (中段叙事)
visual_frequency.LF: 注意事项 + 康复指导 + 浅色背景 (底部收束)
visual_frequency.progression: 医疗功能分区: 诊断(蓝绿)→治疗(蓝)→康复(绿), 警示色(琥珀/红)用于关键风险点

cognitive_level.reader_profile: 医疗从业者·患者教育·健康科普受众
cognitive_level.content_adaptation: 医疗知识可视化, 需符合医疗行业规范, 术语准确, 配色冷静专业

reader_constraint.reader_state: 医疗知识学习者·需要准确可靠信息
reader_constraint.reader_mode: 研读模式(深度学习+医疗决策参考)
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 医疗标准配色 + 临床洁净 + 专业术语 + 安全感

prompt_keywords: medical knowledge map, clinical clean aesthetic, medical teal blue palette, healthcare icons, cross symbols, clinical pathway, diagnosis treatment recovery zones, professional medical infographic, HarmonyOS Sans typography, calm trustworthy
negative_keywords: 3D render, shadows, gradients, photorealistic, dark background, handwritten, sketch, watercolor, cluttered, scary imagery, blood
style_constraint_cn:
【风格强制约束】当前风格: 医疗融合图谱
✅ 必须: 医疗冷静蓝绿配色 + 临床洁净美学 + 医疗十字图标 + 诊断/治疗/康复三区色彩编码 + HarmonyOS Sans字体
❌ 禁止: 3D渲染 + 阴影 + 渐变 + 恐怖血腥 + 暗色背景 + 手绘风格
style_constraint_en: IMPORTANT: Medical clinical clean aesthetic ONLY. Medical teal #00897B + blue #1976D2 + green #2EA86B palette. Medical cross icons. Clinical pathway zones (diagnosis/treatment/recovery). NO 3D, NO scary imagery, NO dark background.
meta_prompt: medical knowledge map, clinical clean aesthetic, medical teal #00897B primary, blue #1976D2 accent, green #2EA86B recovery, amber #F57C00 alert, red #D32F2F critical, medical cross icons, clinical pathway zones, professional medical infographic, HarmonyOS Sans typography, calm trustworthy, clinical white #FAFCFE background
prompt_example: Medical fusion knowledge map, radial layout for disease categories, tree hierarchy for treatment, matrix for symptom severity, medical teal #00897B (diagnosis), blue #1976D2 (treatment), green #2EA86B (recovery), amber #F57C00 (alert), red #D32F2F (critical), medical cross icons on nodes, clinical white #FAFCFE background, HarmonyOS Sans typography (title 20pt bold, body 14pt), 3-layer hierarchy, clinical cleanliness, professional medical aesthetic. --ar 3:4 --s 250 --style raw --industry medical --fusion multi --tool edrawmax
reference_source: G7 Track G演化结晶 - 万兴市场医疗健康分类对齐, 适配医院/科室/健康科普场景
